name: better-godot-mcp
description: Comprehensive Godot Engine integration — 17 tools for game development

GODOT_PATH.title: Godot binary path (optional)
GODOT_PATH.description: Absolute path to Godot 4.x binary. If empty, plugin auto-detects from system PATH.

GODOT_PROJECT_PATH.title: Default Godot project path (optional)
GODOT_PROJECT_PATH.description: Default project root for godot tool calls. Can also pass project_path per call.
